title: DiscCore
description: A core mod of some of my music disc mods.
body:
This is a core mod of some of my own music disc mods.  

Although it is a library mod, but it cannot be used to develop mods.  

It provides a universal ore dictionary for the empty discs of its addition mods.  

To download the additional mods, please go [here](https://wwp.lanzouy.com/i3i0x09orgtg).  

This mod has stopped to update since June 24, 2022.
